entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "Pose-moi une question qui m’aide à commencer."

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "Ne donne pas encore la réponse finale. Demande-moi quelle est selon moi la première étape."

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "Explique pourquoi cette étape fonctionne."

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "Donne-moi un indice, pas la réponse finale."

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "Donne-moi un problème similaire après que j’ai résolu celui-ci."

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "Voici ma réponse. Quelle idée fausse révèle-t-elle ?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "Voici mon essai. Quel est le plus petit indice qui aiderait ?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "Crée un exercice similaire après celui-ci."

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "Fais-moi reformuler l’idée avant de continuer."

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "Interroge-moi sur ce sujet et attends ma réponse."

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "Quelle idée fausse pourrait mener quelqu’un à ma mauvaise réponse ?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: Un test simple

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: Une boucle d’étude solide ressemble à ceci :

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: IA can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid apprentissage entirely.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tuteur IA

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Version française : Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: Version française : Ask for a small hint.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Demandez à l’IA de vérifier cette étape.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: À la fin d’une séance d’étude, posez-vous trois questions :

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Essayez d’abord. Passez trois minutes à tenter sans IA.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: Éviter le piège de la copie

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: Construire une boucle

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: Puis-je faire un nouvel exemple ?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: Puis-je expliquer l’idée sans regarder ?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Différentes tâches d’apprentissage nécessitent différents flux. Utilisez un coach de devoirs pour les indices, un coach d’étapes mathématiques pour résoudre les problèmes, un tuteur socratique pour comprendre en profondeur, des flashcards pour le rappel et des quiz pour une pratique sous pression.

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Est-ce que je sais quoi pratiquer ensuite ?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: Expliquer votre action. Dites à l’IA pourquoi vous avez choisi l’étape suivante.

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: Corriger l'idée fausse.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Pour l'écriture, cela signifie utiliser Writing Coach pour améliorer une thèse, une structure ou un paragraphe tout en gardant votre voix. Pour le code, cela signifie utiliser Code Tutor pour expliquer les erreurs, vous demander de prédire la sortie et vous aider à déboguer plutôt que de coller une solution complète. Pour les examens, cela signifie utiliser Exam Prep Planner pour décider quoi réviser d'abord et comment vous tester.

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: De bons prompts pour étudier honnêtement

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: Voici une version un peu plus solide que vous pouvez réutiliser :

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: Comment étudier avec l'IA sans se tromper soi-même

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Si la réponse est oui, l'IA vous a aidé à étudier. Si la réponse est non, la prochaine étape n'est pas de lire davantage. C'est de pratiquer activement. Ouvrez Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction ou la bibliothèque de prompts d'apprentissage par IA et transformez le sujet en tâche à tenter.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Si le travail est un devoir, commencez dans Homework Coach. Si c'est des maths, utilisez Math Step Coach et demandez-lui de vérifier une étape à la fois. Si vous essayez de comprendre un concept en profondeur, utilisez Socratic Instruction et répondez aux questions avant de demander un résumé.

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Si vous collez une question de devoir et copiez la réponse finale, vous pouvez terminer la tâche, mais vous n'avez pas développé la compétence. Si vous demandez un indice, expliquez votre raisonnement, comparez votre réponse et essayez un problème similaire, l'IA devient un partenaire d'étude plutôt qu'un raccourci.

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: Entraînez-vous sur une nouvelle version.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Pratiquer transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Se rappeler later. Turn the point faible into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Demander diagnosis. Ask what your réponse reveals about your compréhension.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: méthodes de travail

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: Étudier avec l’IA fonctionne mieux lorsque l’outil vous laisse aux commandes.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or réponse a question under pressure.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Cette boucle est plus lente que la copie, mais bien plus rapide que de rester dans la confusion.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The IA explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the réponse in front of you.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: La différence tient à la façon de l’utiliser.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: The question is not whether IA should be part of studying. For many apprenants it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build mémoire, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: L’étape de transfert est essentielle. Si vous ne pouvez résoudre que le problème exact que l’IA vient de détailler, vous avez appris l’exemple. Si vous pouvez résoudre un problème cousin, vous commencez à apprendre l’idée.

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: Ce ne sont pas des mots magiques. Ce sont des garde-fous. Ils gardent la conversation centrée sur la réflexion plutôt que sur la collecte de réponses.

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: Ces prompts vous gardent actif. Ils font en sorte que l’IA soutienne votre raisonnement au lieu de le remplacer.

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: Essayez des prompts comme ceux-ci :

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: Essayez le problème vous-même.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Utilisez AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Utilisez AI for the thinking around the answer

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: Utilisez prompts that make the AI slow down:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: Utilisez the right mode

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Utilisez this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: Écrivez your next step.
